revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天道日女命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|female|qid=Q6581072|1=Female (gender)}}}}
'''Amenomichihime no Mikoto''' (天道日女命) is a goddess mentioned in sources such as the {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}}, {{ill|Sendai Kuji Hongi Taiseikyō|ja|先代旧事本紀大成経|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sendai Kuji Hongi Taiseikyō|qq=}}, and the genealogy of the {{ill|Owari clan|en|Owari clan|qid=Q11465311|lt=Owari clan|1=Owari clan}}. She does not appear in the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} or {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}.<ref>{{cite book|和書|editor=経済雑誌社|title=国史大系|volume=第7巻|publisher=経済雑誌社|year=1898|section=先代旧事本紀 巻五 天孫本紀|page=252|doi=10.11501/991097|url={{NDLDC|991097/140|qq=}}|qq=}}（[[:en:National Diet Library Digital Collections|National Diet Library Digital Collections]]）</ref><ref>{{cite book|和書|author=河村哲夫|title=日本海の神々 ～古代日本海文化～|publisher=日本古代史ネットワーク |date=2022-11-05|section=勘注系図 |page=8 |format=PDF|url=https://nihonkodaishi.net/topics/images/joetsu2022nov/%E6%B2%B3%E6%9D%91-%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%AC%E6%B5%B7%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%80%85.pdf |accessdate=2024-07-15|qq=}}</ref> == Overview == According to the ''Sendai Kuji Hongi Taiseikyō'', her father is [[Kamimusubi]], while in the Owari clan genealogy, her father is {{ill|Ōnamuchi no Kami|ja|大己貴神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōnamuchi no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主|1=Ōkuninushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q276944}}. If the former is accurate, she belongs to the {{ill|Amatsukami|ja|天津神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/matsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Amatsukami|1=Amatsukami|2=zh|3=天神 (日本神話)|4=fr|5=Amatsukami|6=mni|7=ꯑꯃꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ|comment=confirming this goes to Amatsukami|1=Amatsukami|2=zh|3=天神 (日本神話)|4=fr|5=Amatsukami|6=mni|7=ꯑꯃꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (heavenly deities); if the latter, she is categorized among the {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (earthly deities). Although the ''Sendai Kuji Hongi Taiseikyō'' is considered an apocryphal work, the use of "Ame" (heaven) in her name suggests a higher likelihood of her being an Amatsukami. Her husband is {{ill|Amenohoakari|en|Amenohoakari|qid=Q10940411|lt=Amenohoakari|1=Amenohoakari}}, also known as {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ}}. Her child is {{ill|Ame-no-Kaguyama|ja|天香山命|1=Ame-no-Kaguyama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Kaguyama|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Kaguyama|qq=}}, the deity enshrined at {{ill|Yahiko Shrine|en|Yahiko Shrine|qid=Q195684|lt=Yahiko Shrine|1=Yahiko Shrine}}, the ichinomiya of {{ill|Echigo Province|en|Echigo Province|qid=Q666514|lt=Echigo Province|1=Echigo Province}}. Amenokaguyama no Mikoto’s half-brother is {{ill|Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji|lt=Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja|宇摩志麻遅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umashimaji no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウマシマジ}}, also known as Kamimade no Mikoto (可美真手命), enshrined at {{ill|Mononobe Shrine|ja|物部神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe Shrine|1=Mononobe Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11570698}} in {{ill|Iwami Province|en|Iwami Province|qid=Q1053709|lt=Iwami Province|1=Iwami Province}}. == Shrines Dedicated to Her == * {{ill|Aobusuma Shrine|ja|青衾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aobusuma Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Nagoya City) * Tsurugaoka Hachiman Shrine (Saijō City) * {{ill|Kushitamahime Shrine|ja|櫛玉比賣命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitamahime Shrine|qq=}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Japanese deities|en|List of Japanese deities|qid=Q3240847|lt=List of Japanese deities|1=List of Japanese deities}} == Notes == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Shinto Navbox|qq=}} {{shinto-stub|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|天道日女命|version=102970555|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:天道日女命]] <!--standardizing to enwiki standards where this would merely be the intersection of two categories--><!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q121355874}} [[Category:People of ancient Japan]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Characters in Japanese mythology]] [[Category:生没年不詳]]
